title: The Effect of High Dismissal Protection on Bureaucratic Turnover and Productivity
notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. Estrada & Lombardi (2022) AEJ:Applied. Chile 2014 law reform granted permanent contracts to temp teachers with 3+ consecutive years. Treated: 3yr seniority, Control: 2yr seniority. Cohorts 2010-2014 (2014 is post). Simple DiD: reg y treated_post treated i.agno, cluster(clave). No unit FEs — treated is binary group indicator absorbed as FE. Outcome: left_school_plus1 (not working in same school after 1yr). Table 2, Col 1. Expected negative coefficient (dismissal protection reduces turnover).
